title: cmakefmt configuration
description:
The user-config file structure for `.cmakefmt.yaml`, `.cmakefmt.yml`, and
`.cmakefmt.toml`.

All fields are optional — only specified values override the defaults.

experimental.description: Experimental formatting options (unstable, may change between releases).

format.description: Formatting options controlling line width, indentation, casing, and layout.

per_command_overrides.description: Per-command configuration overrides keyed by lowercase command name.

ContinuationAlign.description:
How to indent continuation lines when a wrapped keyword section
overflows [`Config::line_width`].

Suppose `PERMISSIONS OWNER_EXECUTE OWNER_WRITE OWNER_READ
GROUP_EXECUTE GROUP_READ` exceeds the line budget under a
`PATTERN *.h` subgroup:

```cmake
# SameIndent — continuation wraps at the subkwarg indent:
PATTERN *.h
  PERMISSIONS OWNER_EXECUTE OWNER_WRITE OWNER_READ
  GROUP_EXECUTE GROUP_READ

# UnderFirstValue — continuation aligns under the first value
# after the keyword:
PATTERN *.h
  PERMISSIONS OWNER_EXECUTE OWNER_WRITE OWNER_READ
              GROUP_EXECUTE GROUP_READ
```

cmakefmt defaults to [`ContinuationAlign::UnderFirstValue`]: when
a subkwarg group overflows, continuation lands under the first
value column so the eye can tell continuation values apart from
sibling subkwargs. This also matches cmake-format's hanging-indent
style, easing migration. [`ContinuationAlign::SameIndent`] is
available for consumers who prefer continuation at the subkwarg's
own column — consistent with how flat keyword sections
(`PUBLIC`/`PRIVATE`/…) and positional lists wrap elsewhere in the
formatter.

oneOf.description:
Continuation lines wrap at the same indent as the keyword
itself. Consistent with how the rest of the formatter wraps
flat-list sections and positional argument lists.

Continuation lines align under the first value after the
keyword (cmake-format's hanging-indent style). The default.

DangleAlign.description:
How to align the dangling closing paren.

Only takes effect when [`Config::dangle_parens`] is `true`.
Controls where `)` is placed when a call wraps onto multiple lines.

At the top level (block depth = 0) `Prefix` and `Close` both place
the `)` at column 0 because the command sits there — the two
variants are visually identical in this case:

```cmake
# Prefix / Close at top level — `)` at column 0:
target_link_libraries(
  mylib PUBLIC dep1
)

# Open — `)` at the opening-paren column:
target_link_libraries(
  mylib PUBLIC dep1
                     )
```

Inside a nested block (`if/foreach/while/function/...`) the
variants diverge: `Prefix` tracks the command-name indent (one
tab stop per nesting level), while `Close` places the `)` at the
current indent level — one tab stop shallower than the command
name, i.e. flush with the enclosing block.

oneOf.description: Align with the start of the command name.
Align with the opening paren column.
No extra indent (flush with current indent level).

Experimental.description:
Experimental formatting options gated behind `--preview` or the
`[experimental]` config section. All options default to `false`.

These may be promoted to stable defaults in a future release, changed
incompatibly, or removed entirely.

This struct is re-exported at the crate root even when it
contains no options so consumers can write forward-compatible
initialisers:

```
use cmakefmt::{Config, Experimental};

let config = Config {
    experimental: Experimental::default(),
    ..Config::default()
};
```

always_wrap.description: Command names (lowercase) that must always use vertical layout regardless of line width.

autosort.description: Heuristically infer sortability for keyword sections without explicit annotation.

command_case.description: Output casing for command names: `lower`, `upper`, or `unchanged`.

continuation_align.description: How to indent continuation lines: `same-indent` or `under-first-value`.

dangle_align.description: Alignment strategy for a dangling `)`: `prefix`, `open`, or `close`.

dangle_parens.description: Place the closing `)` on its own line when a call wraps.

disable.description: Disable formatting entirely and return the source unchanged.

enable_sort.description: Sort arguments in keyword sections marked `sortable` in the command spec.

fractional_tab_policy.description: How to handle fractional indentation when `use_tabs` is `true`: `use-space` or `round-up`.

keyword_case.description: Output casing for recognized keywords and flags: `lower`, `upper`, or `unchanged`.

line_ending.description: Output line-ending style: `unix` (LF), `windows` (CRLF), or `auto` (detect from input).

line_width.description: Maximum rendered line width before cmakefmt wraps a call. Default: `80`.

max_empty_lines.description: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines to preserve. Default: `1`.

max_hanging_wrap_groups.description: Maximum keyword/flag subgroups to keep in a hanging-wrap layout. Default: `2`.

max_hanging_wrap_lines.description: Maximum wrapped lines to tolerate before switching to a more vertical layout. Default: `2`.

max_hanging_wrap_positional_args.description: Maximum positional arguments to keep in a hanging-wrap layout. Default: `6`.

max_prefix_length.description: Upper heuristic bound used when deciding between compact and wrapped layouts. Default: `10`.

max_rows_cmdline.description: Maximum rows a hanging-wrap positional group may consume before nesting is forced. Default: `2`.

min_prefix_length.description: Lower heuristic bound used when deciding between compact and wrapped layouts. Default: `4`.

require_valid_layout.description: Return an error if any formatted output line exceeds `line_width`.

space_before_control_paren.description: Insert a space before `(` for control-flow commands such as `if`, `foreach`, `while`.

space_before_definition_paren.description: Insert a space before `(` for `function()` and `macro()` definitions.

tab_size.description: Number of spaces per indentation level when `use_tabs` is `false`. Default: `2`.

use_tabs.description: Indent with tab characters instead of spaces.

wrap_after_first_arg.description: Keep the first positional argument on the command line when wrapping.

FractionalTabPolicy.description:
How to handle fractional tab indentation when [`Config::use_tabchars`] is
`true`.

oneOf.description: Leave fractional spaces as-is (utf-8 0x20). The default.
Round fractional indentation up to the next full tab stop (utf-8 0x09).
Auto-detect the line ending from the input source.

bullet_char.description: Preferred bullet character when normalizing markup lists. Default: `*`.

canonicalize_hashrulers.description: Normalize ruler comments when markup handling is enabled.

enum_char.description: Preferred punctuation for numbered lists when normalizing markup. Default: `.`.

explicit_trailing_pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline comments explicitly trailing their preceding argument. Default: `#<`.

fence_pattern.description: Regex describing fenced literal comment blocks.

first_comment_is_literal.description: Preserve the first comment block in a file literally.

hashruler_min_length.description: Minimum ruler length before a hash-only line is treated as a ruler. Default: `10`.

literal_comment_pattern.description: Regex for comments that should never be reflowed.

ruler_pattern.description: Regex describing ruler-style comments that should be treated specially.

PerCommandConfig.description:
Per-command overrides. All fields are optional — only specified fields
override the global config for that command.

# YAML/TOML key names

Two fields use different names in config files than in this Rust
struct (for historical reasons):

| Rust field | YAML/TOML key |
|------------|---------------|
| `max_pargs_hwrap` | `max_hanging_wrap_positional_args` |
| `max_subgroups_hwrap` | `max_hanging_wrap_groups` |

All other fields use the same name in both.

command_case.description: Override the command casing rule for this command only.

continuation_align.description: Override the continuation-alignment rule for this command.

dangle_align.description: Override dangling paren alignment for this command only.

dangle_parens.description: Override dangling paren placement for this command only.

keyword_case.description: Override the keyword casing rule for this command only.

line_width.description: Override the line width for this command only.

max_hanging_wrap_groups.description: Override the hanging-wrap subgroup threshold for this command only.

max_hanging_wrap_positional_args.description:
Override the hanging-wrap positional argument threshold for this
command only.

tab_size.description: Override the indentation width for this command only.

wrap_after_first_arg.description: Keep the first positional argument on the command line when wrapping.
